hero_title: From my spores to your story
hero_desc:
Each commission is cultivated with care, subtlety, and attention to detail.
From OCs to Vtubers, I craft stories that feel alive.
service_desc1: I bring memorable characters to life with personality and depth for games, stories, or mascots.
service_desc2: Exclusive hand-crafted illustrations for gifts, personal use, or commercial projects.
service_desc3: Bring your character to life. I handle design, illustration, and full motion setup for your avatar.
service_desc4: Enhance your stream with custom emotes tailored for every moment.
faq_title1: What kind of art do you make?
faq_desc1: SFW, NSFW (Mild), Gore (Mild), Weapons, Armor, Mecha, PNGTuber, Vtuber, and Complex Backgrounds. If you have a specific idea, explain it in your request and I will evaluate if it's within my scope.
faq_desc2: Some content is not part of my work: Extreme/explicit Gore, Extreme/explicit NSFW, and Furry. Requests involving these themes will be declined.
faq_title3: Can I request something not listed?
faq_desc3: Yes, you can! The list shows what I usually do, but it doesn't mean I'm limited to just that. If you're unsure, just ask before sending your request.
faq_desc4: Yes. I can draw original characters (OCs), game characters, or adaptations based on references.
faq_title5: Do you make art for VTubers or PNGTubers?
faq_desc5: I do! I can create art for PNGTubers, VTuber models, expressions, or additional assets. Please explain what you need in your request.
faq_desc6: Yes. Detailed backgrounds are part of my work, but the price may vary depending on complexity.
faq_title7: How do I place an order?
faq_desc7: Just get in touch by sending: Character references or ideas, the type of art desired, and important details. This way I can evaluate and confirm the quote.
